text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
No matter how many times I go through this, this
energy and atmosphere always gets my heart
racing.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. When I think about how all I must do is
to run as myself, it sets me right at ease, strangely
enough.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho—the final race of the Classic
Triple Crown. I'll be able to hit one of my
milestones today.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to sprint my way through this race with
all my strength!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hi there! So how's Dia doing?
choice_data_list: She's back to her usual self!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everything has been smooth sailing so far.
Moreover, Satono Diamond hasn't mentioned her
jinx even once today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure Satono Diamond takes that as a good
omen.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's Satono Diamond! She looks ready to take
on the world!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
She said in interviews that said she wasn't able to
run her best in the Satsuki Sho or the Japanese
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: If that's true, then I can't wait to see what she looks like when she does do her best!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure we'll be able to see Dia at the top
of her game today!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I mean, just look at her! This is the first time I've
ever seen her this focused!
